executiveSummary: The scanner detected an issue related to Logjam — DHE Export Grade Keys Vulnerability. This represents a security risk on the target asset.
riskExplanation: The exposure of this module (ssl) allows external clients to gather detail, potentially assisting in targeted reconnaissance. testssl.sh identified: not vulnerable, no DH EXPORT ciphers,
businessImpact: Allowing legacy properties to persist increases vulnerability rates, potentially leading to compliance failures under modern regulations like PCI-DSS.
attackScenarios: An attacker retrieves the disclosures from ssl to identify misconfigured interfaces and executes tailored exploit scripts.
nextSteps: Use DHE groups of at least 2048 bits
